title: tillandsia adpressa var. orthiantha
intro: Tillandsia adpressa var. orthiantha, also known as the "tree air plant," is a type of epiphytic bromeliad that belongs to the Tillandsia genus. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tillandsia adpressa var. orthiantha include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as wound healing and skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
